sections.paragraph:
Original: פּרשׂ

Transliteration: pâraś

Phonetic: paw-ras'

BDB Definition:

  1. to spread, spread out, stretch, break in pieces
    1. (Qal)
      1. to spread out, display
      2. to spread over
    2. (Niphal) to be scattered, be spread out
    3. (Piel)
      1. to spread out
      2. to scatter

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 1832

Part(s) of speech: Verb
